Ntc Of Mtn For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond would not result in compliance. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories ; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., for People of the State of California

Tentative Ruling adopted: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents and Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted.
No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
